title: No Falling Leaves
description: Removes Falling Leaves from All Trees (Including Cherry)
body:
**Do you find the falling leaves in Minecraft distracting or unnecessary? The "No Falling Leaves" resource pack is here to help!**

- This **lightweight** and **performance-friendly** pack removes all falling leaf particles from trees (including Cherry ones), giving your game a cleaner and simpler aesthetic. It is also perfect for players who want to boost performance on lower-end systems. 

- This pack ensures trees retain their natural beauty without the extra visual clutter of animated leaf particles.
